title: The Quiet Revolution in Grid-Scale Batteries
subtitle: As evening peaks strain the grid, utilities bet on warehouse-sized batteries that turn stored sunlight into the new baseload
metaDescription: Grid-scale batteries are reshaping how utilities survive the evening peak — cheaper, faster, and quieter than the gas plants they replace.
heroImageAlt: Lightning arcs across a row of tall glass panels standing in shallow water at dusk

title: Right to Repair Reaches the Laptop Aisle
subtitle: Modular mainboards and published schematics move from niche to default as the EU rules bite
metaDescription: EU repairability rules push laptop makers toward modular designs and published service manuals.
heroImageAlt: An open backpack revealing a miniature city of circuit boards and chips

title: German Regulators Block Microsoft Teams Bundling
subtitle: The Bundeskartellamt ruling forces unbundling of Teams from Office 365 in Germany
metaDescription: German antitrust regulators rule against Microsoft Teams bundling.
heroImageAlt: Brass scales in front of orange and teal filing cabinets

title: Glass Anatomy finds stillness on Severance Songs
subtitle: 7.4 — The Rotterdam trio trades maximalism for negative space and lands its sharpest record yet
metaDescription: Review of Severance Songs by Glass Anatomy.
heroImageAlt: Band silhouettes on a stage under crossed spotlights
bodyHtml: Glass Anatomy have spent eight years building toward noise and now, on their fourth record, they have decided to stop. Severance Songs is an album of held breath.

title: Ethereum Staking Yield Drops to 3.1% as Validator Queue Lengthens
subtitle: Record validator count compresses annualized returns, but liquid staking protocols absorb the gap
metaDescription: Ethereum staking yield falls to 3.1% as validator queue reaches new highs.
heroImageAlt: Gold stream flowing from the base of a dark modern tower
bodyHtml:
Ethereum's annualized staking yield has compressed to 3.1%, the lowest since the Merge, as the validator queue reached a record 1.04 million active validators. More capital chasing the same block rewards mechanically shrinks per-validator returns.

Liquid staking protocols are absorbing the difference: Lido and Rocket Pool saw combined deposits of $840 million in May, as retail holders prioritized liquidity over yield optimization.
pullQuote: More validators, same rewards. The math is simple.

title: Northwind achieves SOC 2 Type II certification for its data platform
subtitle: Third-party audit confirms continuous compliance controls across all production systems
metaDescription: Northwind announces SOC 2 Type II certification for its enterprise data platform.
heroImageAlt: Queue of figures walking toward a massive open vault door
bodyHtml: Northwind Inc. today announced that its data platform has received SOC 2 Type II certification following a six-month audit by Prescott Assurance Partners.

title: Uniform: Maison Tomas rethinks the dress code as architecture
subtitle: The Paris label's spring collection asks whether clothing can be load-bearing
metaDescription: Review of the Maison Tomas spring 2026 collection, Uniform.
heroImageAlt: Fashion mannequin with draped terracotta and cream fabric
bodyHtml: Maison Tomas has spent three seasons moving toward a single question: what does clothing owe the body that wears it? Uniform is the clearest answer yet.

title: Cassidy Null live at the Hague: a set that only works in person
subtitle: The Berlin producer built a two-hour structure around one degrading kick-drum sample
metaDescription: Live review of Cassidy Null at Rewire Festival, the Hague.
heroImageAlt: Single lit window in a glass skyscraper reflecting sunset clouds
bodyHtml: You could feel the bass in the ceiling before you heard it. Cassidy Null opened with forty seconds of silence and then the kick arrived, already degraded, already tired.

title: BlackRock Crypto AUM Crosses $30B as Institutional Demand Accelerates
subtitle: The asset manager's digital asset products now represent its fastest-growing category by inflows
metaDescription: BlackRock crypto assets under management hit $30 billion driven by ETF inflows.
heroImageAlt: City skyline at sunset with a gold coin and rising chart
bodyHtml:
BlackRock's cryptocurrency assets under management crossed $30 billion on Monday, driven primarily by inflows into its IBIT Bitcoin ETF and a newer Ether product launched in March. The figure represents a 140% increase from year-end 2025.

BlackRock crypto AUM

The growth rate makes digital assets BlackRock's fastest-growing category by net inflows, ahead of emerging-market equity and sustainable bond funds.

title: Northwind and Meridian Capital announce strategic data partnership
subtitle: Integration will bring Northwind's analytics layer to Meridian's 4,200 enterprise clients
metaDescription: Northwind and Meridian Capital announce a data partnership covering 4,200 enterprise clients.
heroImageAlt: Crowd approaching a monumental dark tower at golden hour
bodyHtml: Northwind Inc. and Meridian Capital Group announced today a multi-year data partnership that will integrate Northwind's analytics platform directly into Meridian's enterprise client portal.

title: The return of the pleat: a structural history
subtitle: From Chanel's wartime pragmatism to the Antwerp school's geometric revival
metaDescription: Historical essay on the pleat in fashion from 1940 to present.
heroImageAlt: Mannequin with flowing terracotta and cream draped fabric
bodyHtml: The pleat is not a decoration. It is a decision about where the body is allowed to move and how much room that movement is granted.

title: Reissue round-up: three records from the analogue revival era
subtitle: Ostinato, RVNG, and Light in the Attic resurface overlooked sessions from 1979 to 1988
metaDescription: Reissue reviews from Ostinato, RVNG, and Light in the Attic.
heroImageAlt: Open backpack revealing a glowing Gothic cathedral inside
bodyHtml: Reissue culture has a short memory problem. These three labels are quietly working against that, digging for sessions that never found their audience the first time.
